Hero.title: Lawyer office Ivan Pavić
Hero.moto: Reliable legal support for citizens and businesses
Hero.description: We provide expert legal advice and representation in property and contractual relations, as well as other key legal areas. We approach each case professionally, discreetly, and with the aim of protecting your interests and ensuring legal certainty.

Banner.discription: We place special emphasis on legal support for entrepreneurs, companies and crafts in everyday business operations and dispute resolution.

AboutMe.workingExperience: The law firm has been operating independently since January 2023, after years of work and experience in the law firm of Damir Batarel in Split (2018 - 2022).
AboutMe.education: I graduated from the Integrated Graduate Study Program in Law at the Faculty of Law in Split in 2016, and passed the bar exam in 2022, which qualified me for independent legal practice and further professional development.
AboutMe.aboutWayOfWork: In my work, I am guided by the principles of responsibility and confidentiality. I provide clients with clear communication, timely information and a precise assessment of the legal situation, along with a strategy adapted to the specific case.
AboutMe.focusAndExperience: Special experience and focus of work are focused on property law, land registry procedures and contract law, including drafting and analyzing contracts and representation in judicial and extrajudicial proceedings.

Services.title: Services
Services.description: The law firm provides legal services to individuals and legal entities in the following areas:

servicesList.title: Property and land registry law
servicesList.description: Representation and advice in matters related to ownership, easements, building rights, liens and other real rights. Arrangement of the land registry status of real estate, implementation of land registry entries and resolution of property relations.

servicesList.title: Obligations law
servicesList.description: Drafting, analysis and legal protection of contracts. Representation in court and out-of-court proceedings and resolution of disputes arising from contractual and other obligatory relationships.

servicesList.title: Inheritance law
servicesList.description: Consulting and representation in inheritance proceedings and resolving inheritance law relationships.

servicesList.title: Administrative law
servicesList.description: Representation in administrative proceedings and disputes before competent authorities.

servicesList.title: Enforcement law
servicesList.description: Preparation and conduct of enforcement proceedings, protection of rights in enforcement and collection of claims.

servicesList.title: Labor law
servicesList.description: Consulting and representing employers and employees in labor relations.

ContactUs.name: Name and surname
ContactUs.description: Send a short description of your inquiry and you will receive a response as soon as possible. We respond to inquiries within two business days. Prior arrangement is required for receiving clients.

Footer.meetings: (Prior arrangement is required for the reception of parties.)
Footer.name: Lawyer office Ivan Pavić
